name: Reuben Soup#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice or shred the corned beef.
2. Combine the corned beef with sauerkraut and set aside.
3. Melt butter in a large soup pot over low heat.
4. Add flour to the melted butter, stir constantly for 3-5 minutes to cook the flour and make a roux.
5. Stir in cream and milk. Add onions.
6. Increase the heat to medium and continue cooking 7-10 minutes, stirring constantly until the soup thickens.
7. Add cheese and stir to blend. Add white pepper, garlic salt, onion powder, celery salt, lemon pepper, and salt.
8. Add the corned beef and sauerkraut mixture from step 2.
9. Stir until well-combined.
10. Makes about 2 quarts, serving 4-6 people.
